title: MRD Resistance Geometry Axis Revision Decision v0

decision.decision_summary: Keep measurement trajectory, biological residual state, and clone architecture as separate axes, with explicit clone-state coupling edges.

axis_changes.reason: Martinez-Lopez 2020 supports serial MRD dynamics as a measurement trajectory using NGS MRD fields; those fields are not interchangeable with single-cell residual-state biology.
Cui 2024 and Cohen 2021 both support residual or resistant malignant plasma cell transcriptional-state extraction, which should remain distinct from MRD measurement direction.
Cui 2024 supports clone architecture and clonal-evolution fields; Cohen 2021 adds source-defined transcriptional clone context, but does not justify merging clone identity with state labels.
Cui 2024 and Cohen 2021 both support a linked clone-state representation for v0 navigation, while the linkage remains source-specific and nonclinical.

comparison_result.intelligence_audit_gate: Phase 3 has an internal adversarial intelligence-audit packet because at least three high-priority buckets now have two public extraction records.

what_this_supports: Use a flexible geometry with separate measurement, state, and clone axes.
Add explicit coupling edges from clone architecture to transcriptional or adaptive state.
Route Phase 3 internal adversarial intelligence review around whether the coupling edges are correctly named and bounded.
Skip external human outreach while preserving claim-upgrade blocks and research-use boundaries.
what_this_does_not_support: No diagnostic, treatment, monitoring, or trial recommendation.
No mechanism ranking by evidence strength, frequency, biological importance, or actionability.
No claim that multiple myeloma has been cured.

review_notes: Decision created after adding the Cohen 2021 second-source extraction for residual-state and clone-state coupling buckets.
Axis decision is structural only and does not change evidence strength or clinical readiness.
Phase 3 should use internal adversarial intelligence review to inspect the clone-state coupling edge before any claim upgrade.
The intelligence audit packet is now the active gate before any axis revision artifact.
External human outreach is not part of the execution path.
